seo.title: GeoStreak - Free Geography Games | Maps, Flags & Country Quiz
seo.description: Play GeoStreak, a free geography platform with map games, flag quizzes and country challenges. Learn and test your geography skills.
seo.ogTitle: GeoStreak - Free Geography Games | Maps, Flags & Country Quiz
seo.ogDescription: Play GeoStreak, a free geography platform with map games, flag quizzes and country challenges. Learn and test your geography skills.

home.modeFlagDesc: Identify countries through their flags and improve your memory with a fast-paced flag quiz.
home.modeFlagKeywords: Keywords: geography quiz, flag quiz, country flags
home.modeMapDesc: Click the right country on the world map and train your map-reading skills in interactive rounds.
home.modeMapKeywords: Keywords: map quiz, geography game, world map game
home.modeDeptDesc: Practice French departments with names and numbers, from easy rounds to harder regional challenges.
home.modeDeptKeywords: Keywords: France geography, departments quiz, French map game
home.modeDeptMapDesc: Click the correct departments on the France map and improve your geographic visualization.
home.modeDeptMapKeywords: Keywords: departments map, France map quiz, geography game
home.modeRegionDesc: Match departments to the right French region and strengthen your understanding of France.
home.modeRegionKeywords: Keywords: regions quiz, France regions, geography learning
home.aboutText: GeoStreak is a geography learning platform designed for students, travelers, and quiz lovers. It combines multiple geography game formats in one place so you can practice countries, maps, flags, and French territories in a simple, fast interface.
home.gamesText: Each round asks one clear question, gives immediate right/wrong feedback, updates your score, and lets you replay instantly to improve.
home.whyText: GeoStreak makes geography practice more interactive than flashcards. You improve location recall, recognize flags faster, and build confidence through regular play with clean visuals and multilingual support.

pageIntro.flagText: This flag quiz helps you identify countries with short rounds and clear feedback. It is a lightweight geography game that improves recognition and memory.
pageIntro.mapTitle: World Map Game: Improve Geography on the Map
pageIntro.mapText: This map quiz asks you to locate the correct country directly on the world map. It is a practical geography game for spatial memory and fast progression.
pageIntro.frDeptText: Practice French departments with names and numbers in quick rounds. This geography game format is effective for revision and long-term memory.
pageIntro.deptMapText: Locate French departments directly on the map and improve visual precision. This mode is built for efficient geography practice.
pageIntro.regionText: This regions quiz trains your understanding of French administrative regions. It is a focused geography game for linking departments to the correct region.
pageIntro.flagParamModeText: Switch between countries and capitals to train either visual recognition or geography recall.
pageIntro.flagParamAnswersText: Choose 2, 4, or 8 options. Fewer options are easier, more options are better practice.
pageIntro.flagParamZoneText: Limit rounds to one region (Europe, Asia...) or keep the full world for broader training.
pageIntro.mapParamDifficultyText: Easy shows clearer borders, Hard keeps the map cleaner and demands better precision.
pageIntro.mapParamModeText: Play with country names or capitals to add an extra geography memory challenge.
pageIntro.mapParamZoneText: Focus on one continent to learn progressively, then return to World mode for mixed rounds.
pageIntro.deptParamDifficultyText: Easy gives stronger visual guides. Hard removes hints and increases recall difficulty.
pageIntro.deptParamModeText: Choose department name or number to practice both administrative references.
pageIntro.deptParamZoneText: Use all of France or a specific region to concentrate your revision by area.
pageIntro.deptParamAnswersText: Choose 2, 4, or 8 options. Fewer options are easier; more options strengthen recall.
pageIntro.deptMapParamDifficultyText: Easy keeps department edges more visible, while Hard asks for cleaner map reading.
pageIntro.deptMapParamModeText: Toggle between department names and numbers for complete map mastery.
pageIntro.deptMapParamZoneText: Play all of France or one region to build confidence step by step.
pageIntro.regionParamAnswersText: Set 2, 4, or 8 choices. Higher values make each region question more demanding.
pageIntro.regionParamQuestionText: You are given a department and must identify the correct region as quickly as possible.
pageIntro.regionParamProgressText: Read immediate feedback after each choice to learn from mistakes and improve fast.

legal.privacyCollectText: GeoStreak is a static website. We do not require account creation and we do not collect direct profile data. Technical usage information may be processed by analytics or hosting providers.
legal.privacyUseText: We use technical data to improve quality, fix issues, and understand which geography pages are most useful. We do not sell personal data.
legal.privacyStorageText: GeoStreak stores local preferences in your browser, such as language and sound settings, to improve user experience.
legal.privacyAdsText: We may show advertising in the future. Third-party providers may use cookies for ad relevance. You can manage these settings in your browser and Google account.
legal.privacyContactText: If you have a privacy question, contact us through the contact page and we will review your request promptly.
legal.termsUseText: GeoStreak provides educational geography content for personal and classroom use. You agree to use the website lawfully and respectfully.
legal.termsAvailabilityText: We aim for accuracy, but content may change or be temporarily unavailable without notice.
legal.termsIpText: Branding, interface elements, and original content are protected by applicable intellectual property rights.
legal.termsLiabilityText: GeoStreak is provided as-is. To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for direct or indirect damages from website use.
legal.termsChangesText: These terms may be updated periodically. Continued use after updates means acceptance of revised terms.
legal.contactIntro: Contact the GeoStreak team for feedback, bug reports, or content suggestions.
legal.contactIncludeText: Please include the page URL, a short description of the issue or request, and your browser/device for technical topics.
legal.contactResponseText: We aim to respond within 3 to 7 business days depending on message volume.
